changes.value:
builtin/skills/explore/SKILL.md

The explore skill references these operations as available:
- `get_definition` (line ~78)
- `get_hover` (line ~82)
- `get_inbound_calls` (line ~92)
- `get_references` (line ~98)
- `workspace_symbol_live` (line ~58)

Of these, only `get inbound_calls` and `search workspace_symbol` are wired in the MCP dispatch. The others (get_definition, get_hover, get_references) have no MCP handlers. An agent following the explore skill will get 'Unknown operation' errors when trying these ops.

Additionally, the skill uses underscore-separated op names (`get_definition`, `get_hover`) but the MCP dispatch convention uses space-separated names (`get symbol`, `get diagnostics`). Even once wired, the op names won't match.

Suggestion: Either defer updating the explore skill until all ops are wired, or add a note that these ops are 'coming soon'. Fix the naming convention to match whichever format the dispatch will use."
Explore skill references ops that are not yet wired to MCP dispatch
